epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ASAS criteria with imaging and clinical features; MRI widely used for early disease in many settings

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to biologics and physiotherapy; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to MRI and rheumatology services in many countries
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Exercise programs, NSAIDs, and biologics (TNF/IL-17 inhibitors) with treat-to-target approaches
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access variability and adherence to long-term exercise programs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: EULAR guideline-driven care and broad access to advanced therapies
